sharc
Documentation développeur
XmlToCMakeLibraryParser.cs
1 using System;
2 using System.Text;
3 using System.Text.RegularExpressions;
4 using System.Collections.Generic;
5 using System.IO;
6 using System.Xml;
7 using System.Xml.Linq;
8 using System.Xml.Serialization;
9 using System.Xml.Schema;
10 using System.Linq;
11 using ArcaneInfra.Common;
12 using System.Reflection;
13 
14 namespace XmlToCMake
15 {
16  public class XmlToCMakeLibraryParser
17  {
18 #region CONFIGURATIONS
19  private static string default_config_file = "config.xml";
20  private static string default_axldb_file = "axldb.txt";
21  private static string default_eclipse_config_file = "eclipse-config.xml";
22 #endregion
23 
24 #region MEMBERS
25  string m_axldb_file = default_axldb_file;
26  string m_eclipse_config_file = default_eclipse_config_file;
27  HashSet<string> m_axl_files = new HashSet<string> ();
28  PackageList m_package_list;
29  String m_cmake_source_dir;
30  String m_cmake_binary_dir;
31  String m_config_name;
32 #endregion
33 
34  public string AxlDbFile {
35  get {
36  return m_axldb_file;
37  }
38  set {
39  this.m_axldb_file = String.IsNullOrEmpty(value) ? default_axldb_file : value;
40  }
41  }
42 
43  public string EclipseConfigFile {
44  get {
45  return m_eclipse_config_file;
46  }
47  set {
48  this.m_eclipse_config_file = String.IsNullOrEmpty(value) ? default_eclipse_config_file : value;
49  }
50  }
51 
52  public bool Verbose { get; set; }
53 
54  private PackageList InitializePackageList (string packages_file, string arcane_packages_file)
55  {
56  // Parser pour virer les && (en mode windows)
57  string content = null;
58  using (StreamReader reader = new StreamReader(packages_file)) {
59  content = reader.ReadToEnd ();
60  }
61  content = Regex.Replace (content, "&&", "&amp;&amp;");
62  using (StreamWriter writer = new StreamWriter(packages_file)) {
63  writer.Write (content);
64  }
65 
66  var package_file_document = new XmlDocument ();
67  package_file_document.Load (packages_file);
68 
69  var arcane_package_file_document = new XmlDocument ();
70  arcane_package_file_document.Load (arcane_packages_file);
71 
72  var package_list = new PackageList (package_file_document, arcane_package_file_document);
73 
74  package_list.Verbose = Verbose;
75 
76  return package_list;
77  }
78 
79  private static void prettyPrintException(Exception ex, XmlTextReader reader, String filename){
80  Console.WriteLine ("Message: {0}", ex.Message);
81  if(ex.InnerException != null){
82  Console.WriteLine ("Inner Problem: {0}", ex.InnerException.Message);
83  Console.WriteLine("Line Number: {0} Colone number: {1}", reader.LineNumber, reader.LinePosition);
84  }
85  }
86 
87  private T Initialize<T> (string file, string xsd)
88  where T : class, new()
89  {
90  T model = null;
91 
92  var serializer = new XmlSerializer (typeof(T));
93 
94  try {
95  using (StreamReader stream = System.IO.File.OpenText(file)) {
96  using (XmlReader reader = XmlReader.Create(stream, Xml.CreateXmlSettings (xsd,file))) {
97  model = serializer.Deserialize (reader) as T;
98  }
99  }
100  } catch(Exception e) {
101  if(e.InnerException == null)
102  Console.Error.WriteLine("Unexpected Exception : {0}", e.Message);
103  else {
104  var exception = e.InnerException as XmlException;
105  Console.Error.WriteLine("\n* VALIDATION ERROR :");
106  Console.Error.WriteLine(" File : {0}", file);
107  Console.Error.WriteLine(" Line : {0}", exception.LineNumber);
108  Console.Error.WriteLine(" Column : {0}", exception.LinePosition);
109  if(exception.Message.Contains("Expected >")) {
110  Console.Error.WriteLine(" Message : Invalid closing xml node <\\>");
111  } else {
112  Console.Error.WriteLine(" Unexpected Exception");
113  }
114  Console.Error.WriteLine(" [Internal exception catched : {0}]", exception.Message);
115  Console.Error.WriteLine();
116  Console.Error.WriteLine("Please, check your xml files and reconfigure!");
117  }
118  }
119 
120  return model;
121  }
122 
123  public void Parse (List<string> args)
124  {
125  m_config_name = default_config_file;
126 
127  m_package_list = InitializePackageList (args [1], args [2]);
128 
129  var output_file = args [3];
130 
131  m_cmake_source_dir = args [4];
132  m_cmake_binary_dir = args [5];
133 
134  var includes = args.GetRange (5, args.Count - 5);
135 
136  var application = Initialize<Application> (args [0], "Libraries.xsd");
137 
138  var f90_libraries = new List<Tuple<Libraries,Library>> ();
139 
140  foreach (var libraries in application.libraries) {
141 
142  libraries.check(Verbose);
143 
144  foreach (Library library in libraries.library) {
145 
146  var languages = new Languages ();
147 
148  languages.Use (ScanLibrary<CMakeList> (library, libraries));
149 
150  if(languages.Contains (Language.f90)) {
151 
152  ScanLibrary<CMakeListf90> (library, libraries, "_f90");
153 
154  f90_libraries.Add (Tuple.Create(libraries,library));
155  }
156  }
157 
158  }
159 
160  using (StreamWriter writer = new StreamWriter(output_file)) {
161 
162  var cmake = new CMakeListLibrariesXml (m_cmake_binary_dir,
163  includes,
164  application,
165  f90_libraries);
166 
167  writer.Write (cmake.TransformText ());
168  }
169 
170  if (m_axldb_file != null) {
171  System.IO.File.WriteAllLines (m_axldb_file, m_axl_files.ToArray ());
172  }
173 
174  if (m_eclipse_config_file != null) {
175  if (Verbose) {
176  Console.WriteLine("Exporting Eclipse configuration for packages: {0}",
177  String.Join(", ", m_package_list.GetEnabledPackageFile().Select(p => p.Name)));
178  }
179 
180  using (StreamWriter writer = new StreamWriter(m_eclipse_config_file)) {
181  var ecf = new EclipseConfigFile(m_package_list.GetEnabledPackageFile());
182  writer.Write (ecf.TransformText ());
183  }
184  }
185 
186  }
187 
188  private Languages ScanLibrary<V> (Library library, Libraries main_library, string suffix = "")
189  where V : new()
190  {
191  var main_library_name = main_library.name.CamelCaseName ();
192  var main_library_path = main_library.path;
193 
194  var name = library.name;
195 
196  var library_name = main_library_name + "_" + library.name.Replace ("-", "_") + suffix;
197 
198  Console.WriteLine (">>>>> Create Library {0}{1}", name, suffix);
199 
200  var tmp = Path.Combine (m_cmake_binary_dir, Path.Combine ("CMakeFiles", library_name));
201  var output_path = tmp + ".dir";
202 
203  var languages = new Languages ();
204 
205  foreach (var directory in library.directory) {
206  String input_path = Path.Combine (m_cmake_source_dir, main_library_path);
207 
208  var full_output_path = Path.Combine (output_path, main_library_path);
209 
210  languages.Use(ParseDirectory<V> (directory, library_name, input_path, full_output_path, 0));
211  }
212 
213  using (StreamWriter writer = new StreamWriter(String.Format("{0}/library.cmake", output_path))) {
214 
215  var full_output_path = Path.Combine (output_path, main_library_path);
216 
217  var cmake = new CMakeListLibrary (library, m_package_list, library_name, full_output_path);
218 
219  writer.Write (cmake.TransformText ());
220  }
221 
222  return languages;
223  }
224 
225  public Languages ParseDirectory<T> (Directory directory, String library_name, String input_path, String output_path, int current_depth)
226  where T : new()
227  {
228  var input = Path.Combine (input_path, directory.Value);
229  var output = Path.Combine (output_path, directory.Value);
230 
231  System.IO.Directory.CreateDirectory (output);
232 
233  if (Verbose) {
234  if (current_depth == 0)
235  Console.WriteLine ("> directory {0}", directory.Value);
236  else
237  Console.WriteLine ("> {0}subdirectory {1}", new string (' ', current_depth * 4), directory.Value);
238  }
239 
240  var failed_dependencies = Dependencies.Failed (directory, m_package_list);
241 
242  var languages = new Languages ();
243 
244  if (failed_dependencies.Count == 0) {
245 
246  languages.Use(ParseConfigFile<T> (library_name, input, output, current_depth + 1));
247 
248  } else {
249  Console.WriteLine ("WARNING: Skip subdirectory {0} due to not satisfied dependency '{1}'", input, String.Join (",", failed_dependencies.ToArray ()));
250  // On crée un fichier makefile vide
251  using (StreamWriter writer = new StreamWriter(output.Replace("\\", "/") + "/makefile.cmake")) {
252  writer.Write ("#\n# WARNING: Skip subdirectory {0} due to not satisfied dependency '{1}'\n#\n", input, String.Join (",", failed_dependencies.ToArray ()));
253  }
254  }
255 
256  return languages;
257  }
258 
259  public Languages ParseConfigFile<T> (String library_name, String input_path, String output_path, int current_depth)
260  where T : new()
261  {
262  var config_path = Path.Combine (input_path, m_config_name).ToString ();
263 
264  var makefile = Initialize<Makefile> (config_path, "Makefile.xsd");
265 
266  var failed_dependencies = Dependencies.Failed (makefile, m_package_list);
267 
268  var languages = new Languages ();
269 
270  if (failed_dependencies.Count != 0) {
271  Console.WriteLine ("WARNING: Skip makefile of {0} due to not satisfied dependency '{1}'", input_path, String.Join (",", failed_dependencies.ToArray ()));
272  // On crée un fichier makefile vide
273  using (StreamWriter writer = new StreamWriter(output_path.Replace("\\", "/") + "/makefile.cmake")) {
274  writer.Write ("#\n# WARNING: Skip subdirectory {0} due to not satisfied dependency '{1}'\n#\n", input_path, String.Join (",", failed_dependencies.ToArray ()));
275  }
276  return languages;
277  }
278 
279  var packages = makefile.neededpackages;
280 
281  List<string> all_compile_flags_buffer = new List<string> ();
282  List<string> all_includes_buffer = new List<string> ();
283  if (packages != null) {
284  foreach (var package in packages) {
285  bool is_optional = (package.optionalSpecified) ? package.optional : false;
286  PackageFile package_file = m_package_list.GetPackageFile (package.name, is_optional);
287  if (package_file != null) {
288  CompilerOptions options = package_file.CompileFlags ();
289  all_compile_flags_buffer.Add(options.Flags);
290  foreach (String include in options.Includes) {
291  all_includes_buffer.Add (String.Format ("\"{0}\"", include));
292  }
293  }
294  }
295  }
296  String all_compile_flags = String.Join (" ", all_compile_flags_buffer.ToArray ());
297 
298  if (makefile.files != null) {
299  foreach (var files in makefile.files) {
300  var lang = files.language;
301  languages.Use(lang);
302  if(lang.isAxl() || lang.isModule() || lang.isService()) {
303  if(files.file != null) {
304  foreach (var file in files.file) {
305  m_axl_files.Add (Path.Combine(input_path,file.Value + ".axl"));
306  }
307  }
308  }
309  }
310  }
311 
312  if (makefile.directories != null) {
313  foreach (var directory in makefile.directories) {
314  languages.Use(ParseDirectory<T> (directory, library_name, input_path, output_path, current_depth));
315  }
316  }
317 
318  using (StreamWriter writer = new StreamWriter(output_path + "/makefile.cmake")) {
319 
320  var cmake = (T)Activator.CreateInstance(typeof(T),
321  makefile,
322  library_name,
323  output_path,
324  input_path, all_compile_flags);
325 
326  var method = cmake.GetType().GetMethod("TransformText");
327 
328  writer.Write (method.Invoke(cmake, null));
329  }
330 
331  return languages;
332  }
333  }
334 }
